description: Author failing tests + a minimal stub for the overwatcher auto-tier gate: under autonomyPolicy:auto WITH the autonomy block present, a sanctioned ALLOWLIST lever auto-applies silently (no ConfirmApply); auto WITHOUT the autonomy block still degrades to prompt (the byte-identical anti-Option-(c) back-compat, §9 Phase 4); a DENYLIST op never auto-applies regardless. Stub = add an optional trailing ctor param autonomyBlockPresent=false to Overwatch so the tests compile + SchedulerFactory still builds.
